Analytics.description: Invoice lifecycle analytics — count/search, approval status, spend, supplier spend, PO-backing, contract spend, commodities, channel/electronic, cycle time. Most-queried explore (79 golden queries).

supplier_search_and_filter.description: Find/filter suppliers by name, content group, payment terms, PO transmission method, contact presence, country, catalog items. Covers 'find supplier containing ignite data', 'list suppliers with 30 day terms', 'suppliers with po method cXML', 'suppliers without a contact', 'which supplier sells copy paper'.
example_queries: show me suppliers containing content group with svb
can you find supplier with name containing 'ignite data'
which suppliers can i buy copy paper from
extract all the supplier with name contains ibm
which supplier is selling tools
list suppliers with 30 day terms
please filter suppliers without a supplier contact
find me a view of all suppliers with po tranmission methods cxml
filter suppliers from the us only
can you find supplier with name containing"ignite data"

available_dimensions.label: Content Groups
available_dimensions.description: Catalog content groups assigned to supplier

available_dimensions.name: payment_terms.code
available_dimensions.label: Payment Terms Code
available_dimensions.description: Filter by payment term (e.g. NET30, NET60)

available_dimensions.name: orders.po_method
available_dimensions.label: PO Transmission Method
available_dimensions.description: Filter by PO method (cXML, email, portal, etc.)

available_dimensions.name: suppliers.primary_contact_id
available_dimensions.label: Primary Contact
available_dimensions.description: Filter suppliers without a primary contact (IS NULL)

supplier_activity_and_spend.description: Supplier activity based on PO/invoice history — top suppliers by spend, suppliers with no recent PO/invoice, top by invoice count, invoice hold analysis, invoice delivery methods.
example_queries: can you show me all suppliers with no purchase orders or invoices against them since in the last 24 months
How many suppliers had spend greater than 1,000,000 in 2025
Navi, I need a list of top 10 suppliers with highest count of Invoices on Hold in 2025
Top 10 suppliers with invoices on hold by invoice count
What is our top 10 spend by supplier
what is our top 10 suppliers by spend for the 2024
Who are the top 10 manual invoice suppliers by count
How many suppliers are sending invoices using different delivery methods

available_dimensions.name: active_suppliers.last_po_date
available_dimensions.label: Last PO Date
available_dimensions.description: Date of supplier's most recent PO

available_dimensions.name: invoices.document_delivery_id
available_dimensions.label: Invoice Delivery Method
available_dimensions.description: How invoices are delivered (manual, cXML, email, etc.)

miscellaneous.label: Miscellaneous
miscellaneous.description: Analytics Agent architecture — routing, schema subagent RAG pipeline, and explore query generation flow.

Analytics.description: Contract management — count/status, creators, supplier-linked contracts, commodity/parent contract spend, and expiry tracking. 15 golden queries.
example_queries: how many active contracts
who are the top 10 contract creators by number of contracts?
which commodities are taking up the most contract spend right now?
which suppliers have the most active contracts?
how many contracts are expiring in the next 12 months?
show me how many contracts i have
how many contracts can be amended
how many contracts have been published with international business machines
create a contract report where supplier is anesh jagtiani
create a contract report where supplier is test cra supplier
show me all contract with supplier padro ltd
how many contracts has each contract creator initiated in the past 12 months?
give me a list of the top 10 suppliers with the most contracts.
what are all contracts expiring in the next 6 months.
what's the total spend under the parent contract this year?

contract_count_and_search.description: Count or find contracts — by status, creator, supplier, type, amendment. Covers 'how many active contracts', 'how many contracts can be amended', 'show contracts with supplier padro ltd', 'top 10 contract creators', 'top 10 suppliers with most contracts'.
example_queries: how many active contracts
show me how many contracts i have
how many contracts can be amended
how many contracts have been published with international business machines
create a contract report where supplier is anesh jagtiani
create a contract report where supplier is test cra supplier
show me all contract with supplier padro ltd
who are the top 10 contract creators by number of contracts?
how many contracts has each contract creator initiated in the past 12 months?
which suppliers have the most active contracts?
give me a list of the top 10 suppliers with the most contracts.

available_dimensions.name: contracts.status
available_dimensions.label: Status
available_dimensions.description: Status: active, expired, draft, pending_approval, etc.

available_dimensions.name: contracts.amendment_type
available_dimensions.label: Amendment Type
available_dimensions.description: Filter by amendment type (filter for 'can be amended')

contract_spend_by_commodity.description: Invoice spend rolled up against contracts or parent contracts, broken down by commodity — top commodities by contract spend, total spend under a parent contract. Covers 'which commodities are taking up the most contract spend', 'what’s the total spend under the parent contract this year'.
example_queries: which commodities are taking up the most contract spend right now?
what are the top 10 commodities by contract spend?
what's the total spend under the parent contract this year?

available_dimensions.name: parent_contract.id
available_dimensions.label: Parent Contract ID
available_dimensions.description: Filter spend under a specific parent contract

available_dimensions.name: invoices.created_date
available_dimensions.label: Invoice Created Date
available_dimensions.description: Filter by invoice date (e.g. this year, last year)

contract_expiry.description: Contracts expiring in upcoming periods — count or list by end date. Covers 'how many contracts expiring in next 12 months', 'all contracts expiring in next 6 months'.
example_queries: how many contracts are expiring in the next 12 months?
what are all contracts expiring in the next 6 months.

Analytics.description: Employee expense reports — spend totals and cycle time correlation over time. Limited golden dataset coverage (1 query).

Total employee expense spend by department this quarter
Policy violation rate by department

expense_analytics.description: Expense spend totals and cycle time trends over time periods.
example_queries: Show me the correlation between expense approval times and amount over the years

Analytics.description: Commodity/category level spend analysis — top commodities by invoice spend. Also used as a join dimension in invoices/orders/contracts.

commodity_spend_breakdown.description: Invoice spend broken down directly by commodity category.
example_queries: what are the top commodity by invoice spend

Analytics.description: User master data — count by status. Used as a filter source in most other explores (99999 = current user). Limited direct golden queries.
example_queries: how many active users are there

user_count.description: Count users by status (active, inactive, etc.).
example_queries: how many active users are there

miscellaneous.label: Miscellaneous
miscellaneous.description: Analytics Agent architecture — routing, schema subagent RAG pipeline, and explore query generation flow.

_metadata.design_principle: Each category holds ALL dims/measures/filters that any query in that family could need. The downstream LLM selects the relevant subset per query.

tree_retrieval_guidance.level_1: Explore selection — classify_explore_type chain picks the right explore
tree_retrieval_guidance.level_2: Category selection — embed user query vs category descriptions; pick best-matching category
tree_retrieval_guidance.level_3: Field selection — LLM picks dims/measures/filters from the matched category (~10-30 fields) rather than searching all 13,747
